productDisplayName: Facit Men Navy Blue Innerwear Vest
description: Style NoteLightweight with a square neck, this knit vest from facit is crafted with a soft fabric that allows the fabric to contour to your silhouette and help you stretch in ease. The boldly printed shoulder straps helps you show off arm definition, while the graphic and flock print on the chest with the brand tab on the nape of the neck adds rugged styling. The printed brand label on the inner neck provides abrasion-free comfort. Team this with tracks or shortsProduct DetailsNavy blue sleeveless knit vest with a stylish square neck that accentuates the upper bodyBold print armhole strapUltra slim FitGraphic and flock print on the chestAbrasion-free labelMaterial and CareCotton engineered stretch rib knit fabricMachine wash warm at 40 degrees using a mild detergentTumble dry lowDo not bleach Model StatisticsThe model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
